productName: Kelso Kandy - KK TERP+INF PR .8g (Single) - Berry Gelato - .8g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Berry Gelato and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of berry, lavender, and blueberry, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
